data.body:
[Triple Drop Campaign Preview]

From 1/31 (Tue), the amount of rewards dropped in Bounty will be tripled.
Don't miss out on this opportunity to develop your student's skill!

🗓️Period: 1/31 (Tue) After Maintenance – 2/6 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
